title: AddressMapper::learn_mapping may leave stale IID if pubkey hashes collide
close_reason: Updated learn_mapping to return bool and reject TOFU violations / IID collisions (first mapping pinned, prevents stale by_iid entries and wrong routing). Switched to canonical lichen_link::iid_from_pubkey (removes duplicate SHA-256 impl and unused dep). Added dedicated test for collision/TOFU/rekey cases. Updated all call sites and tests. Aligns with Python AddressMapper and prior TOFU fixes.
